title: symphyotrichum defoliatum
intro: Symphyotrichum defoliatum, also known as White Heath Aster, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of White Heath Aster can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments.
